Copy the blocks below into GitHub: Repository → Settings → General (or the About pencil on the repo home page).
Requires Admin on the repository. Contributors with push-only access cannot set these fields via API.

=== DESCRIPTION (paste into About) ===

Official hands-on training for RubberDuck. Ten runnable labs with verify scripts, a shared Python demo app, MCP prompts, and per-use-case branches. Practice codebase audit, bug fixing, PR review, impact analysis, and codegen. Quick start: python scripts/run-lab.py --uc 02 --verify. Full guide: GUIDE.md in the repo.

=== WEBSITE ===

https://rubberduck.com/#docs

=== TOPICS (add each as a topic) ===

rubberduck
mcp
developer-tools
security
training
cursor
code-analysis
hands-on-labs
python
